author: Marko Sisovic
name: Parallel Residuals + CUTLASS EVT Fusion
blurb: Built from PR #1523. Restores fuller parallel residual routing on top of the newer GPT-J-style split-lane baseline by writing attention and MLP outputs into both lanes together at block end, while keeping decoder skips on lane0 only. Includes CUTLASS EVT fusion for reproducible throughput. Exact 3-seed legal-TTT mean: 1.07438392 BPB / 2.77524526 nats.
technique_summary: Parallel residual routing + GPT-J-style parallel-in-time lane update + lane0-only decoder skips + CUTLASS EVT fusion + legal TTT
